meta.title: STIX and Your Security Controls
meta.description:
It begins with a STIX (Structured Threat and Information Expression) overview.

Then the session gets into STIX Replay Project whose goal is to have:

1. the ability to programmatically read STIX files
2. parse and replay the associated observables
3. validate security controls and system resiliency

They use DNP3 as the sample protocol, have released code, and are looking for additional contributions.
